2606.20041.title: AI Economist Agent: An Agentic Framework for Model-Grounded Economic Analysis with RAG, Knowledge Graphs, and Large Language Models
2606.20041.paper_summary: We propose a model-grounded RAG-based AI economist with an agentic framework for economic scenario analysis using large language models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs. While LLMs can generate fluent economic narratives, economists are often required to make economic claims grounded by economic theory and real-world data. Based on this motivation, this study proposes an RAG-based AI economist, which utilizes knowledge graphs including economic data and theory and LLM-based agents to plan the analysis, retrieve relevant evidence, select appropriate models, and generate reports. In our framework, we do not produce quantitative claims directly with the language model alone; instead, we generate narratives grounded in explicit model-based computations and linked to the retrieved evidence via AI agents. We refer to our framework as an AI economist agent. We evaluate the AI economist agent in two applications: economist report generation for U.S. inflation persistence and Federal Reserve policy, and bank stress-test narrative generation for U.S. commercial real estate refinancing stress. The results illustrate how grounding the generated reports improves their economic coherence and traceability.
2606.20041.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了一個基於模型的RAG（檢索增強生成）AI經濟學家，具有代理框架，用於利用大型語言模型（LLMs）和知識圖譜進行經濟情境分析。雖然LLMs可以生成流暢的經濟敘述，但經濟學家通常需要根據經濟理論和現實數據來提出經濟主張。基於這一動機，本研究提出了一個基於RAG的AI經濟學家，它利用包含經濟數據和理論的知識圖譜以及基於LLM的代理來規劃分析、檢索相關證據、選擇適當的模型並生成報告。在我們的框架中，我們不僅僅依賴語言模型直接產生定量主張；相反，我們生成基於明確模型計算的敘述，並通過AI代理將其與檢索到的證據相連結。我們將我們的框架稱為AI經濟學家代理。我們在兩個應用中評估AI經濟學家代理：針對美國通脹持續性和聯邦儲備政策的經濟學家報告生成，以及針對美國商業房地產再融資壓力的銀行壓力測試敘述生成。結果顯示，將生成的報告與經濟理論相結合，提高了其經濟一致性和可追溯性。
2606.20041.author: Masahiro Kato et.al.
